command: echo '=== Who killed MT5? ===' && dmesg 2>/dev/null | tail -20 && echo '=== systemctl units ===' && systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'ssh\|cron\|system\|network\|udev\|dbus\|log\|login\|rsyslog\|snap\|unatt' && echo '=== Recent auth/syslog ===' && tail -20 /var/log/syslog 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'kill\|oom\|term\|mt5\|wine' && echo '=== journalctl wine ===' && journalctl --since '5 min ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'wine\|terminal\|kill\|oom' | tail -10 && echo '=== Any running github action SSH sessions ===' && who 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Check for active SSH sessions ===' && ss -tn state established 2>/dev/null | grep ':22 ' && echo '=== All running wine processes ===' && ps aux | grep -i wine | grep -v grep && echo '=== Recent process exits ===' && journalctl --since '10 min ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'Process\|exit\|terminal' | tail -15 && echo '=== crontab ===' && crontab -l 2>/dev/null && echo '=== /etc/cron.d/ ===' && ls /etc/cron.d/ 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Restart MT5 again ===' && export DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine WINEDEBUG=-all STAGING_WRITECOPY=1 && cd '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && wine terminal64.exe & sleep 15 && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep
